## What and why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any issue: Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (in scope: read/query/export/citation/analysis)
- [ ] Docs / examples
- [ ] Refactor / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check src tests` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check src tests` passes
- [ ] `mypy` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes (new behaviour has a test)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` (Unreleased) if user-facing
- [ ] Updated docs/examples if public behaviour changed
- [ ] No invented NRDAX fields; unknown fields preserved; output stays deterministic
- [ ] User-facing text uses hyphens, not em dashes
